---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an agent, skill, command, or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem / use case**
What are you trying to do that's hard today?

**Proposed solution**
What would you like to see? (a new agent / skill / command / config, etc.)

**Fit with the design**
How does it keep the plugin lean and cost-effective? (tiering, model routing, fail-open hooks)

**Alternatives considered**
Anything you've already tried or ruled out.
